title: spergularia bungeana
intro: Spergularia bungeana, also known as Bunge's sandwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is a perennial herb native to mountainous regions of Central Asia, used for its medicinal and herbal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Spergularia bungeana can be prepared as an infusion or tincture for use in herbal remedies.
